name: No Warm Blanket
challenge: You cannot use your favorite club on the hole.
rulesText: Manual mission check. You cannot use your favorite club on the hole. Reward: +3.

name: Pressure Tee
challenge: You must tee off first regardless of honors.
rulesText: Manual mission check. You must tee off first regardless of honors. Reward: +2.

name: No Practice Swing
challenge: No practice swings on any full shot this hole.
rulesText: Manual mission check. No practice swings on any full shot this hole. Reward: +2.

name: Putter Nerves
challenge: Any putt inside 5 feet must be holed cleanly with no gimmies.
rulesText: Manual mission check. Any putt inside 5 feet must be holed cleanly with no gimmies. Reward: +2.

name: One-Club Down
challenge: You must club down by one on one full swing this hole.
rulesText: Manual mission check. You must club down by one on one full swing this hole. Reward: +3.

name: One-Club Up
challenge: On one full swing this hole, you must take one extra club and choke down or swing easy.
rulesText: Manual mission check. On one full swing this hole, you must take one extra club and choke down or swing easy. Reward: +3.

name: Silent Swing
challenge: No talking through your setup, shot, or immediate result. Stay silent until the ball stops.
rulesText: Manual mission check. No talking through your setup, shot, or immediate result. Stay silent until the ball stops. Reward: +2.

name: Commit or Else
challenge: You must choose your club within 10 seconds once it is your turn.
rulesText: Manual mission check. You must choose your club within 10 seconds once it is your turn. Reward: +2.

name: No Rangefinder
challenge: You may not use a rangefinder or GPS on the hole.
rulesText: Manual mission check. You may not use a rangefinder or GPS on the hole. Reward: +2.

name: Blind Confidence
challenge: You must pick your club before hearing anyone else's yardage or advice.
rulesText: Manual mission check. You must pick your club before hearing anyone else's yardage or advice. Reward: +2.

name: Texas Hold'em
challenge: If your ball is on the fringe, you must putt it rather than chip it.
rulesText: Manual mission check. If your ball is on the fringe, you must putt it rather than chip it. Reward: +2.

name: Fairway Wood Jail
challenge: On one non-tee full swing, you must use a fairway wood or hybrid.
rulesText: Manual mission check. On one non-tee full swing, you must use a fairway wood or hybrid. Reward: +3.

name: No Hero Clause
challenge: If you get into trouble, you must take the safe punch-out instead of a miracle shot.
rulesText: Manual mission check. If you get into trouble, you must take the safe punch-out instead of a miracle shot. Reward: +2.

name: Bare Minimum
challenge: You must make bogey or better or lose 1 game point. If you do, gain the listed reward.
rulesText: Manual mission check. Make bogey or better to gain +3. Failure may also apply a manual -1 penalty.

name: Clean Finish
challenge: Once you reach the green, you may not leave any putt short of the hole.
rulesText: Manual mission check. Once you reach the green, you may not leave any putt short of the hole. Reward: +3.

name: No Driver Day
challenge: You may not use driver on this hole.
rulesText: Manual mission check. You may not use driver on this hole. Reward: +3.

name: No Free Drops
challenge: You may not take optional free relief on this hole (mandatory relief still applies).
rulesText: Manual mission check. You may not take optional free relief on this hole (mandatory relief still applies). Reward: +2.

name: One Ball Only
challenge: You may not hit a provisional or second ball on this hole.
rulesText: Manual mission check. You may not hit a provisional or second ball on this hole. Reward: +2.
